## Checklist

- [ ] This is a focused change.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated where needed.
- [ ] Documentation was added or updated where needed.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, passwords, or private data are included.
- [ ] Database migrations are documented, if applicable.
